title: Atlassian MCP Config
description: Configuration file for the atlassian-mcp MCP server

jira.description: Self-hosted Jira Server / Data Center connection settings

url.description: Base URL of your Jira instance, e.g. https://jira.example.com

token.description: Personal Access Token (PAT) for Jira Server authentication
